key_findings: RM stick reader pattern, 32-stick batching, TensorAccessor, tile-sized CB pages
untilize helper, RM stick writer pattern, tile-sized output CB, writer uses TensorAccessor
binary_dest_reuse_tiles optimization, epsilon CB pattern, optional gamma/beta routing, per-channel broadcast

rationale: Gamma/beta are (1,1,1,W) RM. Reader zero-fills 32 sticks, writes 1 stick, compute tilizes. ROW broadcast uses row 0 only.
Scaler CB has 1.0, post_op multiplies DST by 1/W for mean. Input persists in CB for subtract phase.
Existing layernorm utilities use blocked_range iterator for sub-block processing within single compute kernel.

issue: Auto-generated test files have template formatting issues: missing commas in function signatures and calls for extra_args. The reference_body uses x_torch which the template expects. Downstream agents should review and fix generated test scaffolding.
